name: ClawShield
description: Safety hooks for OpenClaw: replaces workspace Markdown injection with prompt + tool intercepts via clawshield-openclaw-bridge.

bridgeCommand.description: Executable or name on PATH for the ClawShield bridge (default: clawshield-openclaw-bridge).

evalTimeoutMs.description: Max milliseconds to wait for hook-eval (default: 120000).

failClosed.description: If true, block tool calls when the bridge fails or times out. If false, allow (default: true).

enablePromptContextEval.description: Run SafetyCore on before_prompt_build payload via bridge (default: true).
